zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格围绕1609附近震荡，日内小幅回落但仍维持在短期均线上方，整体趋势偏震荡偏强短线多空博弈明显市场观望情绪较浓

MACD指标仍处于零轴上方，显示多头动能尚存，但信号线缺失使趋势确认度下降，短期动能略有衰减RSI缺失暂难判断超买超卖区间震荡为主

下方关键支撑位于1598附近与1606低点区域，上方阻力关注1619及1625一线，价格处于区间上沿多空争夺激烈突破需量能配合

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，若有效跌破1598则需谨慎，反弹接近1619可考虑分批止盈或观望整体风险可控但波动仍存注意仓位管理

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading in a tight intraday consolidation around 1609 after a mild 0.61% decline, suggesting short-term indecision following recent upside attempts. Price action is compressing within the 1606–1619 range, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader structure remains mildly constructive as higher lows have not yet been violated, but momentum is fading, signaling potential for either a breakout or continued range-bound behavior. Market participants appear cautious ahead of a clearer directional catalyst.

The 20-day SMA at 1598.73 sits slightly below current price, implying the medium-term trend remains cautiously bullish despite recent weakness. This positioning above the moving average supports a constructive bias, though upside momentum is not accelerating. MACD remains positive at 10.18, indicating underlying bullish momentum persists, but without signal line confirmation, strength appears moderate rather than expansionary. Overall, trend support is intact, yet conviction is weakening.

Immediate support is established at 1606.39, aligned with the session low, followed by stronger structural support near the 1598 SMA20 zone. A sustained break below this region would likely expose downside liquidity toward 1585, where prior consolidation may attract buyers. On the upside, resistance is defined at 1619.67, marking the recent high and repeated rejection point. A clean breakout above this level could unlock further upside momentum.

Trading conditions favor range strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Long positions may be considered near 1600–1606 support with protective stops placed below 1598 to manage downside risk effectively. Profit-taking into the 1619 resistance zone remains prudent given repeated intraday rejection pressure. Alternatively, breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close beyond 1619 or below 1598 before committing, as current price action remains compressed and vulnerable to false moves.
